Motion For An Order Allowing Plaintiff To File Her Certificates Of Merit Under Seal And For In Camera Review Of Certificates Of Merit And A Finding Of Merit Under Ccp 340.1(I)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sarah Kim, Esq. of Panish Shea & Boyle, LLP, T:310.477.1700, for plaintiff Susan Quimby, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff provided an explanation to the court's query as to why the same individual is designated as Does 1 and 2. The matter was discussed. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the Court,

Plaintiff's Motion For An Order Allowing Plaintiff To File Her Certificates Of Merit Under Seal And For In Camera Review Of Certificates Of Merit And A Finding Of Merit Under CCP 340.1(I) is GRANTED.

The court has reviewed the certificates of merit in camera and will sign the proposed order allowing them to be filed under seal and making the requisite finding under Code of Civil Procedure section 340.1(i).

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2020 Continued To Aug-12-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
